titleStmt.title: SII 18.117: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 117. (B.K. No. 20 of 1933-34.) KĀGINELLI, HIREKERUR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up against the front wall of the Vīrabhadra temple.

summary.p: This long inscription belonging to the reign of Vikramāditya VI is dated in the Chālukya-Vikrama year 45, Sārvari, Magha s11u. 2, Monday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkrānti. The date is irregular. The tithi cited, corresponding to A.D. 1121 January 22, fell on Saturday. The Kumbha-saṁkramaṇa occurred on the following Sunday.

It registers a grant of land made for the worship of and offerings to god Kāḷēśvaradēva, and for the feeding of ascetics. Gifts of land and money were also made for the dancing girls and other persons connected with services in the temple. The grants were made by the residents and the Seventy (mahājanas) when Bamma-gāvuṇḍa and Chila-gāvuṇḍa were administering Kāgenele Twelve, Pāṇḍiyūr and Kuppageḍe and Kaliyamarasa was governing Bāsavūr Hundred-and-forty. Gōvindarāja-Daṇḍādhīśa, a servant (baṇṭa) of Anantapāḷa-Daṇḍādhīśa is stated to be the governor of Banavāsedēśa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© nama(ḥ)stuṁgaśirascuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁ bhāya śaṁbhavē . śrīrāmāramaṇapriyaṁ tribhuvanaprastutyanaṁbhōjagarbbhārā
dhyaṁ nagajāviḷōḷanayana śrīnīḷanīrējavistārapraschuracārucaṁdrakiraṇaṁ kāḷēśvaraṁ bhāktikādhāraṁ rakṣisu mmananiśaṁ caṁdrārkkatāraṁbara . kanakādrīṁdra
dinittaloppuvudu jaṁbūdvīpavā dvīpasaṁjanitaṁ nāḍe beḍaṁguvetta bharatakṣētraṁ tatu kṣētraraṁjana va du kuntaḷa viśayavantā kuntaḷādhīśaroḷu ja
nanāthāgraṇi tāne hermmevaḍedaṁ permmāḍibhūpāḷaka . cōḷamadēbhapaṁcavadanaṁ khasadarppaharaṁ kaḷiṁga pāḷakuḷācaḷēṁdrakuḷiśaṁ jayasiṁha kuruṁ
gabhaṁgaśārddūḷanaśēṣarāyamadabhaṁjananeṁbudu vikravūṁkabhūpāḷananaṁburāśi parikhāparyanta mahāmahītaḷa . rāyajhaḷapparāyagajakēsari rāya
nrisiṁha rāyarādhēya virōdhirāyamadamarddana rāya lalāma rāyanārāyaṇa bhāppe nutte dhare baṇnise vikramacakri bhūtaḷaś®yananākuḷaṁ paḍedu pāḷisidaṁ trijagaikavalla
bha . tatpādapadmōpajīvi . Ēḷuṁ mūḷavamaṁ jayalīḷāvibhramada beṁgiyaṁ nijanā thaṁgāḷāgisi bhujabaḷadiṁ pāḷisidananantapāḷadaṁḍādhīśa . ṭeṁṭaṇipa ripunripāḷara gaṁṭalabaḷe bīrasirige baḷeye
ne balvaṁ nāṁṭisidanantapāḷana baṁṭaṁ gōvindarājadaṇḍādhīśa . banavāsedēśameṁbī vanite śrīvaniteyāge gōvinda pesarttanagoppire ripubhūbhujadanujaharaṁ rūḍhiva ḍedanā gōvinda . Ā nāḍa mahimeyaṁ
teṁdaḍe . baḷasida naṁdanāḷi karavoppuva puḻpalatāḷi kūḍe vuṁḍaḷipa śukāḷi baggipa pikāḷi teṟaṁdiradunmadāḷi kaṇgoḷisuva gandhaśāḷi suḷidāḍuva teṁkaṇagāḷi dēse yaṁ taḷadu niraṁta
raṁ nimirddu ranjisuguṁ banavāsedēśadoḷu . jinuguva tuṁbi kuṁtaḷakuḷakke pikaṁ nuḍiganceyānaraṁjanake śukaṁ virājipadharakkeḷasuttire korbbi tōrppa jauvanavana voppavaṁ taḷeye śōbhe mi
galuriḷisōva pāmarījanada savibhramabhramaṇe raṁjisuguṁ banavāsedēśadoḷu . dēsavo ḍedoppuvī banavāseyoḷā vyāsamuniye sanmudade tapaś®sukhadiṁdirddeḍeyaṁ vyāsa
puraṁ tānenippudāytaṁdiṁda . Adu nūṟanālvatene peṁpodavida kaṁpaṇada mahimeyaṁ tāḷde samaṁtadaṟa baḷi kāgeneleyeṁbudu haṁneraḍenipa piriya pesariṁdeseguṁ . sirige nele guṇada nele
bhāsurakīrttige nele vivīkavibhavada nele vistaripa jayavadhuge neleyene karavesaguṁ kāge nele dharitrītaḷadoḷu . kārttikamāsadaṁdina caturddasigurvvuvudoṁdu sadguhā mrittikeyaṁtadaṁ savi
da kāge karaṁ biḷidappudādoḍā mrittike tāne dalu kanakayōgasusiddhavenutta ballava rkkīrttisalintu kāgeneleyādudadallade dēsegādudē . saradhiyaṁ paḷaṁcaleva perggeṟe celviḍidirdda naṁdanaṁ nirupa
mavāgi karttalisutippelevaḷḷimaḍalturaṁjipā suragiya nāga nāgakusmaṁgaḷa puḻvalatāgri haṁ savistaravesedoppe kāgenele śōbhege tāyineleyāge raṁjikuṁ . taruṇakuraṁga lō
caneyarirkkeyinoppuva sūḷegēri satpuruśarenippa hemmeya vaṇigjanadaṁgaḍiyeṁtu nōrppaḍaṁ suragiriyaṁ paḷaṁcaleva dēvagrihaṁ jinagēhasaṁkuḷaṁ sirigeḍeyāge kāgenele raṁji
suguṁ bhuvanāntarāḷadoḷu . Enisirdda kāgenele bhūvaniteya vakṣasthaḷapradēśada navamaṁḍanavenisi tōrppudā maṁḍanadoḷu nāyakada teṟade nāḷuprabhuvippa . puruśākārada manda
ragiriyeṁbudu martyarūpamaṁ tāḷdida sāgaraveṁbudu hemmeya tāyigaruveṁbudu barmmagauṁḍanaṁ jagavinitu . vineyada kaṇi barmmaṁgaṁ janasaṁstute kāḷiyabbegaṁ puṭṭidaniṣṭani
dhānaṁ satyada tāyimaneyenipaṁ vairiviḷayakāḷaṁ kāḷa . tannaya biṇpinēḷge paḍigaṭṭaḷeyādudu mandarakke tannuṁnati mēruviṁge neḷalādudu taṁnaya peṁpu vetta dānaṁ
navakalpavallarige dāṁguḍiyādudenalke marttyarāruṁ neṟe pōlalārttapare kāḷana nudghayaśōviṣāḷana . nīḍenalīyadittu budhasantatiyaṁ padapiṁ kritārttharaṁ māḍidanēḷu
mabdhigaḷaneydida kīrttiyanīgaḷujjaḷa māḍidanadrijēśana mahēśana raṁjipa supratiṣṭheyaṁ māḍidanī jagaṁ pogaḷe kāḷamanēṁ kritakrityanādanō . nalidu tsā
hadinoldu māḍisidanā kāḷēśvarēśaṁge dēgula maṁ raṁjipa nāṭyaśāleyanatiprakhyāti vettirdda vāglalanāmaṁṭapamaṁ diśāpratimeyaṁ kaiḷāsamaṁ pōldudeṁdu vaṁnnaṁ dhare kāḷa
gauṁḍane valā dhanyaṁ peṟarddhanyarē . viḷasitaguṇi kāḷaṁgaṁ keḷeyabbegamuditakīrtti sāśvatalakṣmīniḷayaṁ puṭṭidanakhiḷātaḷasaṁstutanāytavarmmanavikaḷadharmma . naḍu nāḍatīrtthaveṁ
budu baḍavara nidhiyeṁbudakhiḷadhātrīkaigannaḍiyeṁbudu jayalakṣmiya toḍaveṁbudu lōkavaitavarmmana peṁpa . javaḷi jhaṇaṁbamaṁ koḍeyanandaḷamaṁ camarī
ruhaṁgaḷaṁ bhuvanada kaṇnapu(ṁ)ṇyada phaḷaṁ diṭameṁbinavaṁgacittamaṁ tavadolavinde cakri kuḍalaṁkadakāḷegamādiyāgiralu vividhaguṇārnnavaṁpaḍadanennadarārnnegaḷdāytava
rmmana . Ādityappratimeyanesevādityaggrihamanartthiyiṁ māḍisidaṁ dēṁ keṟeyaṁ kaṭṭisi mēdini pogaḷalke dharmmamaṁ nirmmisida . Ātana tammaṁ bhūvikhyātaṁ saujanya
guṇasamētaṁ mahimōpētaṁ rūḍhiya manneyagētaṁ sukavīṁdraśukapikāśraya bhūta . manneyagētaṁgaṁ guṇadunnatiyaṁ taḷeda kaṁcikabbegavogedarmmunnina pāṁḍutanūbhava
rannarppuruśārtthatīrttharaivarmmakkaḷu . piriyaṁ bammane dharmmarājanesedippā dāsamaṁ bhīmanennaroḷaṁ ballidanappa śōbhananēṁ tāṁ mikkarjunaṁ siṁganuṁ puruśārtthā graṇi yaicanuṁ na
kuḷasādēvarkkaḷāgalu vasuṁdhareyoḷu pāṇḍavarinnuvirddarenalantīyayvaruṁ raṁji paru . Avaroḷatipratāpavibhavaṁ kaliśōbhananuttarōttarapravipu
ḷabhāgi śōbhananapārayaśaṁ kali śōbhanaṁ guṇārnnavatuhināṁśu śōbhananudārada tāymane śōbhanaṁ babāppavarivarannanē nijakuḷāṁbaracaṇḍamarīci śōbhana . kalitana
dukkiniṁ palaranaṁjisidaṁ raṇaraṁgadalli mūdalisidanaṁ paḍalvaḍisidaṁ suṇisokkidanaṁ poraḷcidaṁ caladoḍarttu hanneraḍu manneyavaṭṭumanoṁde kontado
(do) ḷu nilisidanendaḍāraḷavo śōbhana·noppuva vīradeḷtara . Ēnendēḷisi kemmane tānucitaṁgeṭṭu kalahamaṁ māḍe jayaśrīnidhi caṁgāḷvana madadāneyaniṟidaṁ pra
tāpi śōbhanavīra . turagadaḷaṁ raṇāṁgaṇadoḷintinisaṁ taledōṟe cēranaṁ bharava sadindavēṟi kaliśōbhananōvade pāyisutta nirbbharabhujakhaḷgadiṁ taṟiye birdda śiraṁ kaḍivōda muṁ
ḍavaḷgaruḷa baḷaṁbe nettara kaḍalu karavāsuravāgadikkuvē . bhaṁgaṁ baḍeyada kalisera giṁge manaṁdāraducitadānavinōdaṁ sāṁgatyasatyavibhavaṁ siṁgaṁ jayaduttaraṁga naṇnanasiṁga . para
vanitāprasaṁgadoḍagūḍada śaucaguṇaṁ kaḷaṁkadoḷu poreyada saccaritravayasakkeḍeyūga tanaṁ bhayāturateyoḷondadaṇmu kujanāśrayavallada hemme
yeṁdu bittarisadarāro bāppamama siṁgananā jayaduttaraṁgana . Anupamamappa hāvari ya kāḷegadoḷu kalijinnarāvutaṁ munididirāgi tāne kali siṁganedurttu bhujā
siyinde cakkane naḍepoyye pāṟuva siraṁ neṟe pōltudu vīralakṣmi siṁganoḷoḍagūḍe bhūvanite potta sumaṁgaḷaratnakuṁbhava . Ātana vallabhe munnina sīteyaniḷisuva pati
bratāguṇadi rūpātiśayavintī bhūtaḷadoḷu bāgaṇabbe peṁpaṁ taḷedaḷu . negaḷda guṇābdhisiṁgavibhugaṁ kuḷabhūśaṇeyappa bāgaṇabbegamavanītaḷaṁ pogaḷe puṭṭi
darujvaḷacārukīrttilakṣmigepatigaḷu vivēkanidhigaḷu vibhuśōbhana barmmagauṁḍugaḷu . ghanatara sauryyaśāḷi kusmāyudhasannibha rūpavibhramaṁ dinakaratējanarnnavagabhī
ranapāraguṇāvaḷaṁbanaṁ vineyaviḷāsaneṁdu dhare baṇnisutippudu siṁganaṁkakāṟana natinīṟanaṁ negaḷda śōbhananaṁ sakaḷāvanītaḷa . munidaḍe siṁgadagurbbaṁ neneyisuvaṁ
kūrttaḍiṁdrabhūjada peṁpaṁ neneyisuvanendaḍā śōbhananadaṭanudāravrittiyaṁ lvavarā puruṣārtthada nele satyada karu parahitalakṣmigikkedāṇaṁ saucā cārada
bāḷmodalennade naraneṁbude siṁganaṇuganaṁ śōbhanana . Avanoḍanevuṭṭidaṁ kairava vallabha vatameṁbavoluditakīrttiya lakṣmībhavanaṁ jaya lakṣmigāṇmanenisu
va bamma . bhavacaraṇābjaṣaṭcaraṇanūrjjitabhaktilatāmanaḻcriyaṁ kuvaḷe lakṣmīniṭiḷāgralalāmanāśritōtsavakaranarṇnava
pratimacārugabhīranenutte kūrttu bhūbhuvanamadāgaḷuṁ bayasi baṇnisa gauṁḍana . muraharanante lakṣmigadhināyakanabjajanante
volu kaḷāpariṇatanaṁbujapriyanavolu ghanatējavirājataṁ sudhākaranavo ya priyanendu saha bittarisuvadāgaḍuṁ
nutayaśōlategārmmanenippa barmmana . kaḷarddakiśōrakēsarige koḷmasagirdda viṣō ragaṁge ku nōrppaḍaggaḷave
ne kondutūguvanarātibaḷaṁ taledōṟe barmmigaṁ muḷidaḍe mṛttu mīṟidaḍe gavuṇḍa
na tōḷoḷirddu meyverccida vīralakṣminaramāmsava nīṁbarddhukilla vairiganyarccaladi bīḍine raci
rāyuvanājiyoḷēṁ pravīṇanō . raṇadhare nāṭyaśāle jaya rvva ppavaṁ taḷeda ta
ḷavenalu ripuvīraraṭṭi tiṁtiṇiviḍidāḍe naṭṭiyaraṁtiralāgipaneṁdaḍidēnaṇa naso na vikramakrama .
dhuradoḷarātisēneyenisaṁ taledōṟidaḍaṁnte kāṇutaṁ parivudu pattimuttuvudu suttuvudettuvudotti koluvudāsurataravappinaṁ tuḷi
vudī kalibammiganeṁba bhīkaramadavāraṇaṁ jitaraṇaṁ kalisiṁgana gandhavāraṇa . Ariśiravaṁbu jaṁ karuḷamāle podaḷda mriṇāḷamāḷe nettare vimaḷāṁbu bā
ḷuḍiye bāḷegaḷāge raṇāgraveṁba tāvaregoḷanaṁ kalaṁki jayamaṁ geḍegoḷvudu bammaṇa bhīkaramadavāraṇaṁ jita kalisiṁgana gandhavāraṇaṁ . girijegavī
śvaragavanurāgade ṣaṇmukhanoldu puṭṭuvantire kali śōbhanaṁgavakhiḷātaḷasaṁstute mallikā vvegaṁ nirupamakīrtti vīralakṣmīpati puṭṭidanātmavaṁśavistaramahimā
prabhāvavenutippudu cīlamanaṁ jagajjana . Inajana nanni śakrajana śauryyaguṇaṁ raghujāta nappa rāmana calaviṁdrabhūruhada cāgamaharppatiyudgha
tējavintinitumanoydumāḍi bidi puṭṭisi rāgadi nāyuvoydanendanudina vurvvi baṇnipudu cīlana sadguṇasaṁpadaṁgaḷa . Aribaḷavettidalli daśakaṁdharaneṁ
budu vaṁdhi bandubittara ganāva ra nayanāṁśuga baḷasuvallige cittajaneṁbudaṁjidaṁgereḍaneyabdhiyeṁbu
du sama kali cī siṟi tavirōdhigaḷāgire meṭṭi sīḷdu mige koṁbino
katu cīlana . siṁduravanya ḷa koḷma vaḍaṁde ba
ruḷu gane tanna cittadoḷu niṁdu nīvi negaḷda ga
ndhavāraṇa . Ā drīṁdranoḷu raṁjipa suramahīja pū sāgarataṭadoḷu padmarāga saduṁ
taripaṁdettaṁte kāḷēśva rjjitaṁ bāppu lōkā bharaṇayōgīṁdra Ā mahānubhāvananvayakhyātiyeṁ
teṁdaḍe . sogayipa śāstra ḷi tatvakaḷā viḷāsapāraganabhimāna vaibhavakke neleyādavarā koḷanūra
draśaktigaḷa mahatvamaṁ pogaḷalāraḷavabdhiparītadhātriyoḷu . Ā vibhu ḷamukhasamayalasatuśrīvallabhanene negaḷdaṁ kēva
lame śrīkaḷēśvarabratinātha . haracaraṇakamaḷabhriṁgaṁ gurukuḷakuvaḷeya kaḷakaḷādharanenisi peṁpuvaḍedaṁ dhareyoḷagī śrīkaḷēśvarabratinātha
sutanamaḷavāṇīnavayauvanavanavasantananupamavidyābhavanaṁ tatvavicārā rṇnavacaṁdra śrījñānamūrtti lōkābharaṇa . śaraṇaṁ vidvatsabhāviśrutavibha
vanāvagaṁ celvuvettābharaṇaṁ vākuśrīge dānabratada mahimegāḷambanaṁ dustamassaṁ haraṇaṁ śrībhāktikarggaṁdaḍe peṟaraḷave puṇyavārāśi lōkābharaṇaṁ lōkaika
taniḷayaṁ viśvavidyānivāsa . © svasti śrīmanmahāprabhu bammagāvuṇḍanuṁ cīlagāvuṇḍanuṁ kāgenelepanneraḍakkaṁ pāṁḍiyūrggaṁ kuppageḍe
kathāvinōdadiṁ gāvuṁḍugeyyuttavirddu bāsavūranūṟanālvattaṟa manne yaṁ kaliyamarasanuṁ samastaprajegaḷerppadiṁbaruvī dharmma
vāgalu svasti śrīmaccāḷukyavikramavarṣada 45 neya śārvvari saṁvatsarada māgha śuddha 2 sōmavāravuttarāyaṇa saṁ
daṁdu śrīmatkāḷēśvaradēvaraṁgabhōgakkaṁ dhūpadīpanaivēdyakkaṁ tapōdhanarāhāra kaṁbhada sūḷeyarggaṁ svasti yama
dhāraṇamōnānuṣṭhānajapasamādhiśīḷasaṁpaṁnarappa śrīmatu lōkābharaṇapaṇḍitara rāpūrvvakaṁ māḍikoṭṭa dharmma bāsaura
ge gardde matta Ūra mūḍaṇa balleyagaṭṭada keḷage hāḷigūṭada gardde mattaloṁdu ggeṟeya keḷage gardde kaṁma Ayvattu Oṁmoṟa
keḷage gadde kamma Ayvattu kāgeneleya hiriyageṟeya keḷage Āḍakedōṁṭa mattaloṁdu Ā tōṁṭada teṁkalu hūvina tōṁṭa kamma yirppattu Ā
gurugaḷa bhikṣege gadde mattaloṁdu Ā bayalatudiya maḍavāyalu gadde mattaloṁdu kaṁma Ayvattu dēvaṁgaṭṭada keṟeya keḷage dēvara nivēdyakke
baṁmōjaṁge gadde mattaloṁdu pātrapāvuḷakke gadde mattaleraḍu Eḻakeya gaṭṭada keṟeya keḷage maṭhada heggaḍe baṁmaṇaṁge gadde kaṁma Ayvattu
keṟeya keḷege rūvāri siṁgōjaṁge gadde kamma Ayvattu hakkalu mattaloṁdu dēvaṁgaṭṭada keṟeya teṁkalu pātrapāvuḷakke kisumattalu haṁne
gaḍu haḷḷiyiṁ dēvara kāṇike gadyāṇaṁ 12 pāṁḍiyūra haḷḷiyaluṁ kāṇike ga 3 kuppageḍeyalu kāṇike ga 1 dēvara puradoḷage naṁdā
kaluṁ soṭageṇneyaṁ biṭṭaru nakhara paṇavaṁ biṭṭaru [Ai]nūrvvaruṁ kēṟiṁge bhattabaḷḷa 2 biṭṭaru Eleya bojaṁgaru The continuation is
Digital edition of SII 18.117 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
